candidate.name: Sample Senior CSM
candidate.cvText:
Senior Customer Success Manager at Gong
Chicago, IL
7 years CSM; mid-market and enterprise segments.

Senior Customer Success Manager · Gong · Chicago, IL
- Manage book of 28 enterprise accounts, $14M ARR under management
- 96% gross retention, 118% net retention FY24; expansion revenue $2.4M
- Customer success, churn reduction, NPS improvement, QBRs, health scores
- Onboarding, lifecycle management, success plans, EBRs, account management
- Renewal cycles, renewals motion, retention strategy, gainsight, totango
- Tools: Gainsight, Salesforce, Slack, Zoom, ChurnZero
knownIssues: Matcher bug B2 (this repo): Seniority detector reads 'Manager' from 'Customer Success Manager' in CV header → seniority='manager' rather than 'senior'. This means the seniority penalty branch for senior-IC → leadership-role (-20) doesn't fire when CSM titles are involved. head-csm Strong (84) below should be Partial.

jobs.title: Implementation Manager
jobs.note: Adjacent family (CSM→impl=15, below floor-cap threshold). Good (63) is reasonable for adjacent family + decent cvScore.

jobs.title: Head of Customer Success
jobs.note: B2: Senior CSM CV detects as 'manager' seniority (because 'Manager' appears in title), so manager → leadership step-up has no penalty branch. Matcher returns Strong (84). SHOULD be Partial.
